tag.v: odbl clean: geen copyright op winkelgegevens aangetroffen

Koninklijk Theater Carré / Royal Theatre Carré
Geld opnemen en storten; In Geldmaat-winkel
Adres opgeheven volgens BAG, wordt wel nog gebruikt door het bedrijf.
Adres bestaat niet meer volgens de BAG, wordt wel gebruikt door het bedrijf.
room for lectures and academical book presentations
hoofdgebouw van de Universiteit van Amsterdam
central administration building of University of Amsterdam
Bierfabriek at this location since 2016 (Sept.). Before that Brasserie Harkema was here.
Geld opnemen en storten; In Geldmaat-winkel
Large gay bar with darkroom downstairs. Weekly and monthly events listed on website.
Women's bar in the Jordaan area
Formerly known as the Krokodil, this bar know attracts a slightly younger audience and is not the hang out of grey gays any more.
Gay naturist bar and lounge with pool table for all men. Free Willie, let it all hang out! Check website for weekly program.

Reopened after 25 years this oldest gay/lesbian bar tries to revive the times of its legendary first owner, Bet van Beren. If this will work or not, it is worth visiting as it has been restored to its original interior.
Adres bestaat niet meer volgens de BAG, wordt wel gebruikt door het bedrijf.
Large pub, on two floors. Interior like a grand English gentlemen's club. Popular hang out in the evening for the cruising young gay men.
Gay bar, heavy reds and retro wallpaper, large tv screens
Cruisy gay bar with darkroom and smoking area
Cruisy gay bar with darkroom downstairs
Small cozy bar with stage annex dance floor, drag queen contests, karaoke, jazz nights and wonderfull authentic art deco lights. Before entering check the Barbi & Ken collection in the window.
Relaxed mixed crowd, thirty-something, alternative crowd, women friendly although mainly gay men. They serve kinky cocktails and sexy snacks and have white and pink bubbles on draught.
Sex club with various theme nights throughout the week.
Amsterdam, brug in de Nieuwe Spiegelstraat
LGBTQ friendly café. Recently under new ownership.
Also LGBTs-friendly, as evidenced by outdoor flag on 2022-04-07.
Adres opgeheven volgens BAG, wordt wel nog gebruikt door het bedrijf.
European Centre for Arts, Culture and Science
NIOD Instituut voor Oorlogs-, Holocaust- en Genocidestudies.
Art of Colors Makeup Artist School
Voor de trappen zijn 2 krappe zitplekken, maar met rolstoel kun je niet verder de winkel in en dus niet bestellen. Daarvoor moet je een trap op.
Centre for Latin American Research and Documentation Library
de Kloof Walk-in Homeless (inloophuis) clothes exchange
Cool location with good music (alternative rock/pop) and a lot of food, beer, cocktails and extra rooms to see sports
Now serves all day, not just breakfast.
Tuned instruments for musicians on the wall
Adres opgeheven volgens BAG, wordt wel nog gebruikt door het bedrijf.
Great space for training or meetings upto 25 persons
Back to Black coffee bar and roastery
Cocktail bar. HPS stands for "Hiding in Plain Sight."
Mo-Su 16:30-22:30 open "Restaurant and Bar" || Su-We 12:30-23:00 open "Bar" || Th-Sa 12:00-00:00 open "Bar"
Situated at ground floor of DoubleTree Hotel
Mo-Su, PH 11:00-23:00; Jan 01 off; Apr 27 off; Dec 25-26 off; Dec 31 off
Geld opnemen en storten; In Bruna
The famous bench in The Fault in Our Stars
The Fault In Our Stars Bench
Die Zugänglichkeit ist wirklich hervorragend mit den Schritten, die in einem Aufzug ändern
Adres bestaat niet meer volgens de BAG, wordt wel gebruikt door het bedrijf.
in the building of hotel W.
on first floor, in bookshop Scheltema
Tu-Su,PH 17:00-23:00; Mo off; Jan 01 off; Dec 25,26 off
Adres bestaat niet meer volgens de BAG, wordt wel gebruikt door het bedrijf.
Regular themed evenings with DJs and Drag shows. Bingo in Tuesday
It used to be Exit Café and quite popular. Now it looks like a ski-hut (so far for the chique, even if it is après) and still is popular.
15.30 - 18.00 transfer to aboveground. Between 07.00 - 09:00 transfer to underground. type: Urilift: https://nl.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bestand:Urilift,_G%C3%B6teborg,_Kungsportsplatsen.webm

My Red Light is a non-profit window brothel situated in the Amsterdam red light district that has been established to promote better labour conditions for sex workers, to elevate their agency, to improve their treatment and to strengthen their rights.
Rooms belonging to My Red Light Foundation

My Red Light is a non-profit window brothel situated in the Amsterdam red light district that has been established to promote better labour conditions for sex workers, to elevate their agency, to improve their treatment and to strengthen their rights.
Rooms belonging to My Red Light Foundation

Italian Restaurant housemade pasta and pizza
The White Room by Jacob Jan Boerma

The renowned restaurant Peacock Alley is situated in Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam, and is the place to be. Enjoy the ambiance of the legendary Amsterdam restaurant which paints an unparalleled setting for a leisurely meal with its gold and blue palette.
The White Room by Jacob Jan Boerma
Het Groene Paleis - Coffee and Bakery
Urilift combi: 2 male & 1 female urinal toilets Automatic flushing 6 x per hour To be operational lifts up: Th-Sa 15.30 - 18.00 and sinks down in pavement: Fr-Su 7.00 - 9.00
Inside, up, right at the reception, through the restaurant, downstairs.

Internet Archive Europe is a project by the Dutch non-profit research library Stichting Internet Archive. It is building collections and tools to bring them to life.

associated with Protestantse Kerk Nederland (PKN) & Church of Scotland (CoS).
